summary: Iteration 6 = verification of the AGENT-ACTION-EXECUTION FIX (the '<actions>' JSON-block parser that lets AI agents make REAL DB writes instead of just talking about them). LOCAL CODE: 100% verified — executeAgentActions() at /app/api/agents.ts L510-559 parses <actions>[{type,data}]</actions> blocks and calls platform.createPortfolio/createLead/createCustomer/createOpportunity/createQuote/createActivity/createProduct/create_category + update_* + mark_invoice_paid. Wired into /chat (L1385), /chat/stream (L1439-1441 sends 'actions' + 'done' SSE events), and /execute/:capId (L1490). ACTIONS_INSTRUCTIONS French system prompt at L562-587 tells Claude to include <actions> when user requests CRM writes. liSearchProspects (L200-231) has NO mock data — returns {success:false, results:[], error, reason, workaround}. platform.createActivity (L467-470) throws on DB error (no more silent simulated:true). platform.sendWhatsApp (L480-482) returns explicit 'non implémenté' error. Frontend CommandBar at /app/src/pages/AITeam.tsx L241-332 handles 'delta'/'actions'/'done' SSE events + renders action list under assistant bubble with data-testid='cmd-actions' + ✓/✗ green/red icons. LOCAL BUILD: npx tsc --noEmit -p . = 0 errors. npx vite build = 3273 modules, 10.21s, dist/assets/index-*.js contains BOTH 'cmd-actions' and 'open-command-bar' testids. REGRESSION: 28/29 pytest passed (single failure = Vercel cold-start timeout on /platform/quotes+/invoices, unrelated flake — same as iter5). PROD BEHAVIOR: DEPLOY PENDING. Live bundle assets/index-zy-c8RVj.js has 'open-command-bar' but LACKS 'cmd-actions' testid (proof of stale FE deploy). POST /api/agents/timothy/execute/u-free with input='Ajoute 3 établissements…' returned success:true + a nice markdown reply BUT no 'actions' or 'actions_executed' fields in JSON — Claude pretended to add them, portfolio_items count stayed at 51 (no new rows: Hotel Ledger / Mami Wata / Belle Vie NOT persisted). Same on /chat and /chat/stream (done event missing 'actions'). Iter5 fixes DID land (LinkedIn honesty, SSE stream endpoint, /runs/live, /presence/online all now respond correctly), but iter6's newer actions-parser has not yet been auto-deployed. ACTION: user must click 'Save to GitHub' in Emergent chat to trigger Vercel redeploy — after which every /chat, /chat/stream and /execute response will include actions[] and real DB rows will be created.

minor.issue: Deploy pending for the actions-parser fix. Response JSON currently has keys [success, agent, capability, label, reply, saved_to_reports] with NO 'actions' array — meaning old code path still live. Local source (agents.ts L1388, L1441, L1496) has already been updated to include actions + actions_executed. When user asks 'Ajoute 3 établissements dans le portefeuille', Claude replies with a markdown table pretending it did it, but portfolio_items row count in Neon stays unchanged (verified: 51 → 51, no matches for Hotel Ledger / Mami Wata / Belle Vie). No functional bug in code — deploy timing only. Action: user must Save to GitHub.

integration_issues.flow: CommandBar (/ai-team) → Ordre 'Ajoute X dans le portefeuille'
integration_issues.issue: Deploy pending: prod bundle index-zy-c8RVj.js contains open-command-bar testid but NOT cmd-actions testid. Locally-built dist bundle contains both. On prod today, when superadmin sends 'Ajoute 2 établissements' via CommandBar, SSE streaming shows Claude's markdown reply live (nice UX), but the ✓/✗ actions block never appears — because backend doesn't emit the 'actions' SSE event yet AND Claude doesn't get the ACTIONS_INSTRUCTIONS system prompt appended. No JS error, no console error — just silent 'pretend success'. Will be fixed by the same 'Save to GitHub' step.

action_items: USER ACTION REQUIRED (single step): Click 'Save to GitHub' in the Emergent chat so Vercel auto-redeploys. Everything else is verified in local source + local build.

AFTER DEPLOY (verification checklist): (1) POST /api/agents/timothy/execute/u-free with input='Ajoute Hotel QATest dans le portefeuille' → response should now contain actions:[{type:'create_portfolio', ok:true, id:52, name:'Hotel QATest'}] + actions_executed:1. (2) GET /api/agents/platform/portfolio → count should be 52 (was 51) with a row Hotel QATest. (3) Open /ai-team → click 'Donner un ordre' → send same message via CommandBar → data-testid='cmd-actions' block should appear under assistant bubble with '✓ create_portfolio #52 — Hotel QATest' in green.

PROMPT-ENGINEERING NOTE (not a code bug): Even after the deploy lands, Claude Fable-5 may occasionally choose NOT to emit the <actions> block if it feels the request is ambiguous (e.g. 'Ajoute Hotel X' — Claude asked 'prospect ou client déjà signé ?' on /chat today). The ACTIONS_INSTRUCTIONS prompt is strong ('RÈGLES ABSOLUES : Si tu peux exécuter la demande via une action → INCLURE le bloc <actions>. Ne dis JAMAIS je vais ajouter sans <actions>') but non-deterministic. If users report agents still 'pretending' post-deploy, consider adding one-shot examples inside the persona: 'Exemple: user="Ajoute Hotel Ledger", ta réponse commence par <actions>[{...}]</actions> …'. Optional.
(Long-term, non-blocking) Vite build warns bundle >500KB (1,375 KB / 366 KB gz). Consider dynamic import for /ai-team and lucide-react/recharts.
critical_code_review_comments: executeAgentActions() at agents.ts L510-559 is well-structured: robust regex extraction, JSON.parse with try/catch, agent_id auto-injection, per-action try/catch that pushes {ok:false, error} instead of aborting the whole batch. It also aliases 'create_portfolio_item' and 'create_establishment' to createPortfolio and auto-injects category_id:1 fallback — good UX safeguard.

cleanReply string returned to UI has the raw <actions>[...] block stripped via reply.replace(match[0], '').trim() — user never sees the JSON, only the human-readable prose Claude writes AROUND the block. Clean.
ACTIONS_INSTRUCTIONS is appended to /chat, /chat/stream, AND /execute — all three paths now instruct Claude uniformly. No path was left with the old 'talk-only' behaviour.

/chat/stream SSE now sends TWO separate events at the tail: 'actions' (for eager UI update, immediately after Claude finishes) and 'done' (with duration_ms + full cleanReply + actions). FE handler at AITeam.tsx L294-306 correctly handles both: it patches actions[] onto the last assistant bubble on 'actions' event, then replaces content with cleanReply on 'done'.

platform.sendEmail (L473-479) still returns success:true + queued:true when SMTP_FROM is set, but the actual send happens via existing mailer elsewhere (comment L475-476). Consider whether this is truly 'live' — but not blocking for this iteration.

platform.createActivity (L467-470) properly awaits INSERT and returns ok(rows[0]) with NO try/catch — errors bubble up so executeAgentActions() catches them and marks ok:false. ✓ matches the review-request contract.
platform.sendWhatsApp (L480-482) returns { data: { queued:false, success:false, error: 'WhatsApp non implémenté...' } } — honest.
Regression suite: 28/29 pass. The one flake (test_no_html_crash_get → /platform/quotes+/invoices read timeout after 25s) is Vercel cold-start, reproduced in iter5 too — not a code regression.

Recommendation (non-blocking): Add a lightweight backend integration test in /app/backend/tests/test_agents_actions_parser.py that (a) unit-tests executeAgentActions() against a mock DB by extracting the reply parsing and (b) once prod deploys, e2e-tests POST /execute/u-free asserting that response.actions[0].ok===true and portfolio count incremented by 1. Would catch any future regression on the actions-parser.

success_rate.backend: Local source: 100% (executeAgentActions + ACTIONS_INSTRUCTIONS + all 3 endpoints wired + honest LinkedIn/createActivity/sendWhatsApp). Prod: 60% — iter5 fixes deployed (LinkedIn honesty ✓, SSE stream ✓, /runs/live ✓, /presence/online ✓) but iter6 actions parser NOT yet deployed (0/3 endpoints emit actions[]).
success_rate.frontend: Local: 100% (cmd-actions + open-command-bar testids + delta/actions/done SSE handling). Prod: partial — CommandBar UI + streaming works, but cmd-actions block cannot render because prod bundle lacks the testid and backend doesn't emit actions events yet.

test_credentials: eden@tbi-center.fr / loub@ki2014D — verified working on production login (200, cookie 'token' set). Portfolio count read: 51 rows.
seed_data_creation: None. Sent 2 attempted-write commands via CommandBar and 1 via curl POST /execute/u-free — all confirmed NO rows persisted (portfolio still at 51 rows, no matching names). This is the ACTUAL BUG being reported by the user, and it will only stop happening after Save to GitHub → Vercel redeploy.
context_for_next_testing_agent: AFTER USER SAVES TO GITHUB and Vercel deploys the actions-parser: (1) re-run curl POST /api/agents/timothy/execute/u-free with input='Ajoute Hotel QATest dans le portefeuille' → assert response.actions[0].ok===true, actions_executed>=1. (2) GET /api/agents/platform/portfolio → assert count incremented + row with name='Hotel QATest' exists (search: for it in items). (3) Open /ai-team as superadmin, click open-command-bar, choose Timothy, send 'Ajoute Hotel QATest2 dans le portefeuille', wait 8-15s, assert [data-testid='cmd-actions'] visible with '✓ create_portfolio #N — Hotel QATest2'. (4) Verify via GET /api/portfolio-items or /api/agents/platform/portfolio that Hotel QATest2 persisted. Optional: assert bundle URL curl(/) → contains 'cmd-actions' string (proof of new FE deploy). Regression suite at /app/backend/tests/test_agents_regression.py must still be 28/29. If Claude sometimes omits <actions>, that's prompt-engineering — see action_items.
rca of the issue: USER-REPORTED BUG: 'J'ai demandé au agent d'ajouter des établissements dans le portefeuille mais rien n'est fait, supprime tous les mode simulation et corrige moi ça'. ROOT CAUSE: Every agent-facing endpoint (/chat, /chat/stream, /execute/:capId) called askClaude(system, message) which returned prose only — Claude 'talked' about creating rows (Markdown table with '✅ Ordre exécuté — Ajout au portefeuille') but the server never persisted anything to Postgres. Additionally, several helpers (liSearchProspects mock LI001/002/003, createActivity's silent catch simulated:true, sendWhatsApp's fake queued:true) returned success even when no real work happened, producing false positives in the UI. FIX: (a) added executeAgentActions() that regex-extracts <actions>[{type,data}]</actions> JSON blocks from Claude's reply and executes each against the real platform.* helpers (which do genuine INSERT INTO portfolio_items / leads / customers / opportunities / quotes / activities via q()); (b) added ACTIONS_INSTRUCTIONS French system prompt to all three routes, forcing Claude to embed the JSON block when the user asks for CRM writes; (c) response and SSE events now carry actions[] so the FE renders ✓/✗ per action under the assistant bubble (data-testid='cmd-actions'); (d) mock LinkedIn results removed, createActivity throws on DB failure, sendWhatsApp returns explicit 'non implémenté'. DEPLOY STATE: local /app source + local build both contain the fix; prod https://smart-business-sigma.vercel.app is still running the pre-fix commit (proof: FE bundle assets/index-zy-c8RVj.js lacks 'cmd-actions' testid AND /execute/u-free response JSON has no 'actions' key). MITIGATION: user must Save to GitHub to trigger Vercel auto-deploy — no further code change needed. Regression suite 28/29 passing, no functional or auth regression detected.
